name: drawer
description: A slide-in sheet anchored to a viewport edge (right/left/bottom/top); same dialog ARIA semantics as lv-dialog plus focus trap and Escape-to-close.
docs: Register <lv-drawer> by importing components/ui/drawer.ts from your entry point. Bind `open` to control visibility; set `side` to 'right' | 'left' | 'bottom' | 'top'. Listen for `lv-close` to update state.
